-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-2uex","title":"Build public user profile pages","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-2h8.

## Task
Build public user profile pages.

## Page: /user/[username]

### Profile Header
- Avatar (large)
- Display name
- Username (@handle)
- Bio
- Join date ("Member since Jan 2024")
- Reputation badges (inline)
- Social links (icons)
- Stats: X prompts, Y saves received

### Content Tabs
- **Prompts** (default): Grid of public prompts
- **Packs**: Public prompt packs
- **Skills**: Public skills

Each tab shows:
- Grid of content cards
- Sort options (newest, popular)
- Empty state if none

### Features
- Follow button (V2 - placeholder for now)
- Report user button (in menu)
- Share profile button

## Database Updates
Add to user_profiles:
- username (unique, lowercase, alphanumeric + underscore)
- is_public (default true)

## API Endpoint
GET /api/users/[username]
Returns:
- Profile data
- Public content counts
- Badges

GET /api/users/[username]/prompts
Paginated public prompts.

## Username Validation
- 3-20 characters
- Lowercase letters, numbers, underscores
- Cannot start with number
- No reserved words (admin, api, etc.)

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-30k9","title":"Build marketing landing page","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-6ax.

## Task
Build the marketing landing page for organic discovery.

## Page: / (root)

### Hero Section
- Large headline: "The Prompt Library for AI Power Users"
- Subheadline: "Discover, create, and share prompts for Claude, GPT, and beyond."
- Primary CTA: "Get Started Free" or "Try Premium"
- Secondary: "Explore Prompts"
- Hero visual: Screenshot or animation of product

### Features Grid
6-8 feature cards:
1. Swap Meet - Community marketplace
2. Prompt Packs - Curated bundles
3. Skills - AI agent configurations
4. Collections - Organize your library
5. CLI Integration - Terminal access
6. Analytics - Track performance

### How It Works
Three-step visual:
1. Sign up with Google (instant)
2. Browse or create prompts
3. Share and track usage

### Testimonials (placeholder)
- Quote cards (can be placeholder initially)
- Profile photos and names

### Pricing Preview
- Side-by-side Free vs Premium
- "View full pricing" link

### Final CTA
- "Ready to level up your AI workflow?"
- Sign up button

### Footer
- Product links (Features, Pricing, Docs)
- Legal links (Terms, Privacy, Guidelines)
- Social links
- Copyright

## Implementation
- Server component for SEO
- Animations with Framer Motion
- Responsive grid layouts
- Lazy load images
- Focus on Core Web Vitals

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-32fx","title":"Implement public roadmap and feature voting","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-zuri.

## Task
Create a public roadmap with feature voting to engage community.

## Why This Matters
- Transparency about direction
- Community input on priorities
- Reduce duplicate feature requests
- Build anticipation

## Features

### 1. Public Roadmap
- Planned features list
- Current development status
- Recently shipped features
- Timeline (quarters, not dates)

### 2. Feature Voting
- Upvote features
- Add comments
- Submit new ideas
- Track your submissions

### 3. Status Categories
| Status | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| Under Review | New submission |
| Planned | Will be built |
| In Progress | Currently building |
| Shipped | Live in production |
| Declined | Won't build (with reason) |

### 4. User Submissions
- Submit feature idea
- Add description
- Add use case
- Similar feature detection

## Database Schema
```typescript
export const featureRequests = pgTable('feature_requests', {
  id: uuid('id').primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
  
  // Content
  title: text('title').notNull(),
  description: text('description').notNull(),
  useCase: text('use_case'),
  
  // Status
  status: text('status').default('under_review'),
  statusNote: text('status_note'),
  
  // Tracking
  submittedBy: uuid('submitted_by').references(() => userProfiles.id),
  voteCount: integer('vote_count').default(0),
  commentCount: integer('comment_count').default(0),
  
  // Timeline
  plannedQuarter: text('planned_quarter'), // e.g., 'Q2 2026'
  shippedAt: timestamp('shipped_at'),
  
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow(),
});

export const featureVotes = pgTable('feature_votes', {
  featureId: uuid('feature_id').references(() => featureRequests.id).notNull(),
  userId: uuid('user_id').references(() => userProfiles.id).notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow(),
}, (table) => [
  primaryKey({ columns: [table.featureId, table.userId] }),
]);
```

## Public Pages
- /roadmap - Main roadmap view
- /roadmap/[id] - Feature detail
- /roadmap/submit - Submit idea

## Admin Features
- Change feature status
- Set planned quarter
- Merge duplicates
- Respond to requests

## Notifications
- Status change notification
- Shipped notification
- Vote milestone (10, 50, 100)

## Files to Create
- src/app/(public)/roadmap/page.tsx
- src/app/(public)/roadmap/[id]/page.tsx
- src/app/api/roadmap/route.ts
- src/app/(app)/admin/roadmap/page.tsx
- src/components/roadmap/

## Success Criteria
- Roadmap publicly accessible
- Voting works correctly
- Submissions moderated
- Status updates communicated
